description:
On this page, you can purchase SMS packages that allow you to communicate easily and quickly with your clients. With SMS messages, you can send appointment confirmations immediately after booking and reminders a day before the scheduled visit, provided this feature is enabled in the Settings.

Select the right SMS package depending on your business needs. Our platform offers flexible options tailored to various message volumes, helping you save time and resources while efficiently managing communication.

Increase your service efficiency — regular reminders can reduce no-shows and improve client satisfaction!
title: Top up SMS credits
